E

Email - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email
Email provides interfaces for sending email using smtp server which is configured on a device or provided by a client.

Container for an email address and optional display name

Provides the email information with address.

Provides the Email address information including address and name.

The sets of attributes for sending email.

The sets of attributes for an email to be sent.

EmailBuilder(EmailAttributes) - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.scanner.ScanAttributes.EmailBuilder
